name: X/Twitter Auto Cleaner
description: Automatically delete tweets, unlikes, unreposts, and delete replies on X/Twitter

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/tailwindcss@2.2.19/dist/tailwind.min.css; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:;
